allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('engines:', JSON.stringify\(p.engines||'none'\)\); const d={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; for \(const k of ['vite','vue','@vitejs/plugin-vue','svelte','@sveltejs/kit','react','next','tailwindcss']\) if\(d[k]\) console.log\(k, d[k]\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(p.scripts,null,1\)\); const d={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; for \(const k of Object.keys\(d\)\) if\(/vue-cli|webpack|cli-service|node-sass|sass|vite|nuxt/.test\(k\)\) console.log\(k, d[k]\);")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '4318|vite preview' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; "detenido PID $\($_.ProcessId\)" })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '4320|vite preview' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; "detenido PID $\($_.ProcessId\)" })
